educationMatch.explanation: Master's degree from Zhejiang University satisfies educational requirements. EE/Automation provides strong technical foundation well-suited to a platform and architecture-heavy tech lead role.

experienceMatch.requiredYears: 4-8 years shipping real product; recent hands-on coding last 1-2 years
experienceMatch.explanation: 26 total years exceeds the 4-8 year target range, creating an overqualification concern for this player-coach role. However, the candidate's recent hands-on development (Spring Boot + Vue.js hobby projects: growing app and finance platform) and active AI-assisted coding with Claude Code demonstrates a genuine commitment to staying hands-on. AI coding tools dramatically increase individual productivity, effectively compressing the stack learning curve. Manager-of-IC experience is fully met. The key question is cultural fit: does the candidate genuinely want to stay 50% hands-on?

matchedSkills: Node.js ecosystem (Vite, npm, same toolchain as Next.js)
Vue.js (component model directly transferable to React)
missingSkills: React (Vue.js experience highly transferable; minor syntax differences)
Next.js (SSR concepts transferable from backend experience; minimal ramp-up with AI coding)
Prisma ORM (concept same as JPA/Hibernate; syntax learnable quickly)
skillMatch.explanation: Stronger match than surface-level stack comparison suggests. Vue 3 is built on the same TypeScript + Node.js ecosystem as React/Next.js — same toolchain (Vite/npm/ESLint), same TypeScript types, same component-based reactivity paradigm. The candidate builds production systems in Vue 3 + TypeScript today. React is a 1-2 week transition for an experienced Vue developer. With AI-assisted coding (Claude Code), Next.js/Prisma ramp-up is further compressed to days. Strong architectural instincts ensure correct system design decisions regardless of specific framework syntax.

responsibilityMatch.explanation: Good match across most responsibilities. Architecture from first principles: strong — designed 3 generations of cloud platforms at eBay from scratch. Mentorship/engineering bar: proven — coached engineers to staff-level promotion. CTO partnership: strong — operated as primary technical decision-maker for eBay cloud platform. Build process not inherit: demonstrated through multiple greenfield platform launches. Gap: 50% hands-on coding in the specific React/Next.js stack requires stack transition, though AI-assisted development significantly reduces the productivity risk. Startup pace vs large-enterprise background is a cultural gap to acknowledge.

missingSkills: Startup/small team fast-moving experience (background is large enterprise)
softSkillMatch.explanation: Strong soft skills throughout. Technical leadership and mentorship deeply proven. Architectural instincts demonstrated across multiple platform generations. CTO-equivalent decision-making at eBay cloud platform scale. Built teams and processes from scratch multiple times. Minor gap: 5-day in-office startup culture vs large-enterprise eBay background — cultural adjustment possible but manageable.

strengths: Vue 3 + TypeScript experience is directly transferable to React/Next.js — same Node.js ecosystem, same component paradigm, same toolchain
AI-assisted coding (Claude Code) dramatically accelerates stack transition and individual coding productivity
Exceptional architectural instincts from designing 3 generations of cloud platforms — can architect any system from first principles
Strong mentorship and engineering bar-raising: promoted engineers from senior to staff level
CTO partnership mindset: served as primary technical decision-maker for eBay cloud, natural right-hand fit
Build-from-scratch track record: built growing app and finance platform solo end-to-end
Recent hands-on coding demonstrated through independent Spring Boot + Vue.js production systems
improvements: Build a small Next.js/React/Prisma project (can use AI coding tools) to explicitly demonstrate stack familiarity before interview
Address overqualification directly in cover letter: explain why a player-coach role is the right next step, not a step back
Highlight startup-like experiences within eBay: early CCOE team building, greenfield platform launches, fast-moving decisions
Clarify 5-day in-office compatibility with current location
Emphasize AI coding productivity explicitly: frame as force-multiplier that makes 50% coding commitment very achievable
